Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeremy Pasternak, Esq., for for plaintiff and moving party: Jaime Ellison

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jaime Ellison's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve further verified responses within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $465 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Set For Trial On Nov-05-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-17-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 306
